meaning: adj.爱抚的,表现爱情的,亲切的
examples: He was gently caressing her golden hair.
Caressing Heidi's curly hair, he said, "Now I must go, Heidi!"
The spring wind is gentle and caressing.
On the bridges and in the parks of Paris, they spin and frolic, caressing and nuzzling.
Bob springs into action, giving her a few brisk but caressing thumps on the back.
